title: Open 3rd SMIB
cue: Play SMIB during the opening of the Third Degree.

title: Open 3rd Tracing Board
cue: Play during the opening of the Third Degree Tracing Board.

title: Open 3rd All Glory
cue: Play 'All Glory to the Most High' during the 3rd degree opening.

title: Grave Cloth (Largo)
cue: Play Handel's Largo from Xerxes for the Grave Cloth sequence.

title: Door to Kneeling Stool
cue: Play as candidate moves from the door to the kneeling stool.

title: So Mote It Be
cue: Play SMIB after prayer.

title: Kneeling to WM
cue: Play as candidate moves from kneeling stool to WM.

title: WM to JW
cue: Play as candidate moves from WM to JW.

title: JW to SW
cue: Play as candidate moves from JW to SW.

title: SW to WM
cue: Play as candidate moves from SW to WM.

title: WM to JW (Loop 2)
cue: Play as candidate moves from WM to JW on the subsequent circuit.

title: JW to SW (Loop 2)
cue: Play as candidate moves from JW to SW on the subsequent circuit.

title: Properly Prepared to WM
cue: Play when candidate is reported properly prepared and passes to WM.

title: WM to JW (Prep)
cue: Play as candidate passes from WM to JW.

title: JW to SW (Prep)
cue: Play as candidate passes from JW to SW.

title: Kneel
cue: Play when candidate kneels for the obligation.

title: Keep Thy
cue: Play during the solemn support segment of the obligation.

title: After Laid on Ground
cue: Play immediately after the candidate is laid on the ground.

title: Ceremonial Interlude (39a)
cue: Play continuation interlude for the traditional ceremony.

title: JW Walks Around
cue: Play as the Junior Warden perambulates.

title: SW Walks Around
cue: Play as the Senior Warden perambulates.

title: Now Make Trial
cue: Play after the command to 'now make trial'.

title: After EOM
cue: Play following the completion of the Exhortation / Onward March.

title: After Badge Extension
cue: Play immediately following the Master Mason badge extension address.

title: After WTs
cue: Play after the Working Tools address is completed.

title: After Final Address
cue: Play after the final traditional charge is completed.

title: WM to Saluting Base
file: music/MM/46.2 from WM to Saluting Base.mp3
cue: Play as candidate moves from WM to the saluting base.

title: Heads Out the Door
cue: Play as the candidate retiring leaves the lodge room.
